    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class scorefour.view.Panel
    Paints the contents of a ProgramController to the Panel
    Panel - Class in scorefour.view
    A Panel which acts as the main rendering and input handler for a ProgramController
    Panel(ProgramController) - Constructor for class scorefour.view.Panel
    Constructs a new Panel.
    PANEL_HEIGHT - Static variable in class scorefour.view.ProgramView
    PANEL_HEIGHT defines the height of the Panel.
    PANEL_WIDTH - Static variable in class scorefour.view.ProgramView
    PANEL_WIDTH defines the width of the Panel.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.AddCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.ClearCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.DrawBoardCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.

    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.

    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.QuitCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.RemoveCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.ShowBoardCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.StartGUICommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.StopGUICommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in interface scorefour.common.Command
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    Peg - Class in scorefour.model
    A Peg contains 4 empty spaces for Bead's which can be added or removed.
    Peg(int) - Constructor for class scorefour.model.Peg
    Constructs a new Peg at a specified y location.
    Peg(Peg) - Constructor for class scorefour.model.Peg
    Constructs a copy of a Peg into a new peg.
    PEG_HOVER - Static variable in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    The index of the peg hover effect.
    PegController - Class in scorefour.controller
    A PegController handles all events related to the Peg.
    PegController(Peg, int, int, AudioController, GameManager) - Constructor for class scorefour.controller.PegController
    Constructs a new PegController.
    playEffect(int) - Method in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    Plays the effect of the provided index.
    Player - Class in scorefour.player
    Player of the game.
    Player(BeadColour) - Constructor for class scorefour.player.Player
    Constructs a new Player.
    playSong(int) - Method in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    Plays the song of the provided index.
    printASCIIBoard() - Method in class scorefour.view.BoardView
    Draws an ASCII representation of the current Board state.
    ProgramController - Class in scorefour.controller
    The ProgramController manages the core logic of the program.
    ProgramController() - Constructor for class scorefour.controller.ProgramController
    Constructs the ProgramController object, initializes the required classes, and starts the game.
    ProgramView - Class in scorefour.view
    The main view of the ProgramController
    ProgramView(ProgramController) - Constructor for class scorefour.view.ProgramView
    Constructs a new ProgramView
